pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Replace deprecated springfox-swagger dependencies with springdoc-openapi-starter, which is required for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc version to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve potential classpath issues during migration.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with specific environment variables.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and organized sections for better readability.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven explicitly since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or build tools.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the entrypoint to run the packaged JAR file instead of dropping into a bash shell.
Copy source code and configuration files into the image to enable the build step.
Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new setup.
